# fly_volume (Data Source)

Retrieves information about an existing Fly.io volume.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fly_volume" "existing" {
  app = "my-app"
  id  = "vol_abc123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The name of the app the volume belongs to.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the volume.

### Read-Only

- `attached_machine_id` (String) The ID of the machine the volume is attached to.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the volume was created.
- `encrypted` (Boolean) Whether the volume is encrypted.
- `name` (String) The name of the volume.
- `region` (String) The region where the volume is located.
- `size_gb` (Number) The size of the volume in GB.
- `state` (String) The current state of the volume.
- `zone` (String) The zone the volume is in.
